globalRisks: opening dialogue-weight without enough corridor contact

scenes.title: The Infiltration
scenes.biggestGap: Several lines named absence or process instead of keeping Jaina in contact with service stone, torch grease, and corridor pressure.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Palace service passages and the last service door into the chamber flank.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Lye, grease, latch, mop bucket, shelf edge, torch bracket, worn stone.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina reads Frostmourne through cold in wall stones, bread-taste, and bodily strain.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Torch crackle, plate weight, blood on Jaina's lip, hands on the service door.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Nosebleed at the last door and the chamber voices through wood.

scenes.title: The Murder
scenes.biggestGap: A few summary reactions pulled away from the room just as the chamber, throne, and old recognition needed to stay tactile.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Imperial Chamber dome, seal, throne dais, curtain-shadow flank.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Marble, crown on the floor, blood on steps, staff grip slipping.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina tracks the seam and feels old recognition freeze into tactical necessity.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Curtain cover, staff grip, Arthas crossing the aisle over the seal.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Concealment dying as Arthas turns and advances off the dais.

scenes.title: The Fight
scenes.biggestGap: A handful of summary or mechanism-heavy lines blurred the physical cost of the fight and the room damage around it.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Columns, golden seal, dais steps, chamber floor opened into lanes and kill angles.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Cracked marble, shattered ice, blood on armor seams, snapped shaft, dropped staff.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina thinks in seam timing and spell sequence while her body keeps failing under cold and impact.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Commands and warnings attached to arrows, slipping footing, and visible injuries.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Arthas on the steps, Sylvanas rising for the final lane, Jaina dragging fire out of a winter-cold room.

scenes.title: The Aftermath
scenes.biggestGap: The soul-echo and arrest stretch risked drifting into abstract mechanism or generalized mood unless kept tied to bodies, room evidence, and late-arriving eyes.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: The same chamber re-read by late witnesses as a crime scene, then the side exit into service stone.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Cracked blade, cuffs, spearpoints, cloak over Terenas, bent crown point.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina measures the room's false story faster than she can fight it and feels Frostmourne's changed pulse bodily.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Orders and report pinned to the blade on the floor, blood, and exhausted bodies under guard.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Bound descent back into service passages with kitchen lye and the faint return of bread-taste.
